snippet.description:
0:00 – Introduction
1:43 – His philosophy of life
3:20 – What Sundar Pichai reads
4:28 – Influences that shaped him
5:30 – What still surprises him
7:00 – His opinion on India
8:50 – How he stays grounded
11:11 – What India means to him
11:42 – Will AI replace humans?
14:44 – Fields where AI will play a big role
15:39 – Can AI help achieve equality?
16:56 – Driving change in his teams
17:58 – Balancing work and children

Whether you are a tech enthusiast, a business leader, or simply curious about the future of AI, this episode of The Icons with Sundar Pichai and Twinkle Khanna will show you a whole new side of the Google CEO that you haven't seen before.

In an exclusive backstage conversation at the Women Will event, we delved into Sundar's upbringing in India and how his journey has led him to become the CEO of one of the world's most innovative tech companies. 

Check out the conversation to learn how he maintains a balance between tutoring his kids and being tutored by them, what sparked his interest in computers, and to get unique perspectives on how this exciting technology is transforming every industry.

Edited by: Aman Agarwal
